name: Deploy to Netlify Now
description: Manually trigger: commit all changes and push to GitHub, which deploys to insightpulseanalysis.netlify.app

then.prompt:
The user wants to deploy now. Execute these steps:

1. git -C "C:\Users\prade\OneDrive\Desktop\InsightPulse\sentiment-ai-platform" add -A
2. git -C "C:\Users\prade\OneDrive\Desktop\InsightPulse\sentiment-ai-platform" commit -m "deploy: manual trigger from Kiro IDE"
3. git -C "C:\Users\prade\OneDrive\Desktop\InsightPulse\sentiment-ai-platform" push origin main
4. Tell the user: 'Pushed to GitHub. GitHub Actions will now build and deploy to https://insightpulseanalysis.netlify.app — takes about 2 minutes.'
